sql_array: CREATE TABLE snowflake_test (id UInt64, ts DateTime64(3));
UPDATE snowflake_test SET ts = snowflakeToDateTime64(1426860802823350272, 'UTC') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, ts FROM snowflake_test WHERE ts = snowflakeToDateTime64(1426860802823350272, 'UTC');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM snowflake_test WHERE ts > snowflakeToDateTime64(1426860802823350272, 'UTC');
